parsed.explanation: Corrected XML structure by flattening improperly nested BIBL tags (Lipsius and Amphitheatro entries) into sibling elements. Standardized price tags from PRICE to PRIZE. Escaped ampersands (&) for XML validity. Fixed character encoding issues (mojibake) to restore German umlauts and currency symbols (xr.). Corrected obvious OCR transcription errors in titles (Magnitudine, Paradieses, Poesia, d'Italia, obscuriss.).
